corrections.note: Image clearly reads accusative ἄροτρον, not genitive ἀρότρου.

corrections.location: verse 29, line number at start of final line
corrections.correct: οὕτως κεραμεὺς καθήμενος ἐν ἔργῳ αὐτοῦ
corrections.note: This line begins verse 29 in the chapter numbering already; the repeated 29 is not printed in the body here and appears to have been captured from marginal numbering.

corrections.correct: om και ι̅ο̅δ̅ αὐ- των ι̅ο̅δ̅] αυτου Bb ℵc.a
corrections.note: A line-break split after αὐ- was omitted from the apparatus transcription; the following variant belongs to verse 25, not as a separate line.
Apparatus lemma matches printed body form ἀκμονος; transcript has extra omega.

notes: Running head matches. Body generally accurate aside from one case error, one accent issue, and a captured marginal number. Apparatus mostly accurate, but one verse-25 line-break omission and one incorrect lemma spelling were found.
